questionHtml:
Which of the following will form a buffer solution if combined in appropriate molar ratios?

A. HCl and NaCl

B. NaOH and HCOONa

C. NH4Cl and HCl

D. HCl and NH3

meta.title: Which of the following will form a buffer solution if combined in appropriate molar ratios? A. HCl and NaCl B. NaOH and HCOONa C. NH4Cl and HCl D. HCl and NH3
